title: The First Transmission
storyIntro: The first signal arrives at dusk, buried under static and panic.
objective: Decode the origin point of the emergency message and report the town name.
rules: Work as a full crew before giving your final answer.
Use only mission-provided notes and clues.
clueText: Every distorted coordinate points back to one place: the town where the Gate first shimmered open.

title: The Christmas Lights Code
storyIntro: Flickering lights in a cabin window begin spelling out a warning.
objective: Translate the blinking sequence into the hidden instruction.
rules: Only one answer may be submitted per full crew discussion.
Keep the coded sequence intact before decoding.
clueText: The pattern repeats near the words that lead crews away from danger.

title: Build the Safe Zone
storyIntro: Before the breach widens, the camp must establish a secure command zone.
objective: Construct and organize a Safe Zone that can support all later missions.
rules: Every crew member must contribute to setup.
Leaders verify readiness on site.
clueText: A stable base is built with teamwork, not speed.

title: Antenna Tower
storyIntro: The camp antenna has gone dead. Without it, no one can hear what is coming.
objective: Restore the tower alignment and relay the recovery signal.
rules: Complete each station in order.
No unsafe climbing or rushing.
clueText: Signal strength returns when the crew moves as one.

title: The Lab Beneath Havenwood
storyIntro: Below the town lies a sealed lab where the first experiments began.
objective: Unlock the final file phrase hidden inside the lab notes.
rules: Search every clue before attempting the phrase.
The answer must be submitted exactly.
clueText: The strongest teams know the lab survived on one thing: loyalty and trust.

title: Close the Mini-Gates
storyIntro: Small fractures are opening around camp and feeding the main breach.
objective: Use the collected runes to identify the word that stabilizes the fractures.
rules: All rune pieces must be accounted for.
Do not force an answer before checking the full phrase.
clueText: The control room logs mark only one final state as acceptable.

title: Silent Morning Protocol
storyIntro: The Mind Flayer is listening. The morning must begin in total control.
objective: Navigate the full protocol without breaking silence or formation.
rules: No speaking during the mission window.
Leaders confirm completion.
clueText: Control starts long before the first words are spoken.

title: The Possession Game
storyIntro: The Other Side feeds on weak reactions. Crews must identify what to shut down.
objective: Assemble the three-word defense phrase from the scenario deck.
rules: Discuss every scenario before choosing the phrase.
Submit only after the full phrase is assembled.
clueText: Three threats make the breach stronger: ego, noise, and fear.

title: Who Opened the Gate?
storyIntro: The final witness file reveals an uncomfortable truth about the breach.
objective: Answer the accusation hidden across all prior clues.
rules: Review the entire evidence chain before answering.
The answer is collective, not individual.
clueText: The file insists the Gate responds to choices made by the whole team.

title: Final Gate Ceremony
storyIntro: The camp gathers at the breach for the closing ritual.
objective: Speak the final declaration that seals the Gate.
rules: The declaration must be spoken together.
Leaders trigger the final check only once.
clueText: Only one collective choice breaks the hold of the Other Side.

title: The Return Plan
storyIntro: The breach is closing, but camp still needs a safe route home.
objective: Finalize the crew debrief and return strategy.
rules: Every member contributes one reflection.
Leaders confirm completion.
clueText: The final step is returning stronger than you arrived.
